themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "וְעָשׂ֥וּ: and made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".

themes.label: Suffering
themes.summary: This chapter deals with affliction, sorrow, trial, lament, endurance, or hardship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "יִבְכּ֤וּ: for they weep - to weep; generally to bemoan".
